title: Pudding’s Betrayal Is Revealed
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Reiju, Judge, Luffy, Sanji as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Just get out of here

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: with the straw hats, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if I was able to do such a thing, what'd happen to the baratie?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: worry about that after you make it out.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you stay here, you and everyone else will die.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's one memory I have that I simply can't put out of my mind...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: mother and father's big fight.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I realized what exactly it meant only much later.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: mother was firmly against making the four of you,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Soon to be born, into unfeeling machines.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Someone needs to

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Stop it! Those are my children!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you rob them of their hearts, they won't even be human anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Then let them be monsters.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: As long as they can win wars!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will give only my kids the ultimate power!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ultimately, she was forced to undergo the surgery...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But, in an effort to put an end to Father's wild ambitions, mother took a drug.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A drug strong enough to react with the manipulated lineage factors of the children inside her.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O!?! What the hell are you doing, Sola?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But it was all for Naught.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your three brothers started showing signs of their superhuman- mess one after another.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Good!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Opera- lion was a success, your highness!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: shall we further edit their blueprints using drugs, my king?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Well...

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: This is quite strange... only Sanji is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That can't be. Let us wait

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: for him to grow a bit more.

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Sanji Fed an Animal ?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's a sign of emotion! He shouldn't have any!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Someone else I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And at the same time,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: mother began to weaken before our eyes, due to the aftereffects of the drug.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Reiji! You know, Sanji made me a lunchbox the other day!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You continued to grow into more of a human with each passing day.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Someone else I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm the reason she... her life...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Don't think of it like that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: mother was happy, from the bottom of her heart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: She didn't regret a thing!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Guess what Sanji said to me today?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: "Get better soon!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAAAAH!!! He's the best kid in the world!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But father wasn't willing to let that slide.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: he faulted you for everything that happened;

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: and became even harder on you.

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Sanji is a worthless failure.

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: But you are no failure.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The child that mother protected with her very life,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only one that was born with any trace of real emotion.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That is who you are, Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And that is why

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You are kinder than anyone.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 55 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
